content:
🆓 Free Tier (Public Data Only)


Access basic UCC and public records at no cost.

Data Sources:
  1. State Secretary of State UCC Search Portals (50 states)
    • Free public UCC-1 filing searches
    • Scraping via Playwright/Puppeteer
    • Rate-limited to ~100 searches/day per state
    • Fields: Debtor name, secured party, filing date, collateral type, status

  1. SEC EDGAR API (Free)
    • Public company filings, 10-Ks, 10-Qs
    • Business descriptions, risk factors
    • Endpoint: https://data.sec.gov/submissions/CIK{number}.json

  1. OSHA Violations API (Free)
    • Workplace safety violations
    • Endpoint: https://data.dol.gov/get/inspection

  1. USPTO Trademark API (Free)
context: From document: data enrichment strategy for ucc-mca intelligence platform — chunk 2 (chunk 2/32)
